entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: An important food legume of the semi-arid tropics grown mainly under subsistence agriculture

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The climatic region where pigeonpea is primarily cultivated

entities.name: YIELD STAGNATION
entities.description: The lack of increase in crop yield over a period of five decades

entities.name: CMS-BASED HYBRID TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A technology utilizing cytoplasmic male sterility to develop hybrid crops

entities.name: STANDARD HETEROSIS
entities.description: The superiority of a hybrid over the average of its parents

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The recovery of male fertility in hybrid offspring

entities.name: BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used to transfer a specific trait to a recurrent parent

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of choosing plants with desired agronomic or genetic traits

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: The inability of a plant to produce functional pollen

entities.name: AGRONOMIC SUPERIORITY
entities.description: The possession of superior agronomic characteristics

entities.name: CAJANUS CAJANIFOLIUS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea used as a CMS donor

entities.name: A4 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A specific type of cytoplasm associated with male sterility in Cajanus species

entities.name: ICPA 2039
entities.description: A CMS donor line derived from Cajanus cajanifolius

entities.name: ICPB 2043
entities.description: A medium-maturity group recurrent parent line also known as ICPL 20176

entities.name: ICPA 2043
entities.description: A stable male sterile line developed through backcrossing and selection

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the plant to reach maturity

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds used as a measure of seed size

entities.name: PODS PLANT-1
entities.description: The number of pods produced per plant

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT PLANT-1
entities.description: The total weight of seeds produced per plant

entities.name: ICPH 2671
entities.description: A heterotic restorer line used in crossing combinations

entities.name: MALE FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of a plant to produce functional pollen

entities.name: G×E INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genotype and environment affecting trait expression

entities.name: GRAIN YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: SOUTH AND CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: The geographic regions where pigeonpea is grown
